forecast-period.text: Clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog on the eastern slopes in the early morning. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then shifting east to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then tending east to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog near the coast in the early morning. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then turning east to southeasterly in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Becoming cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h tending northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the late afternoon then tending east to southeasterly in the evening.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Cloud clearing. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then tending easterly in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming light in the late evening.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 34.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers in the far west, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
